title: asplenium × kummerlei
intro: Asplenium × kummerlei, also known as Kummerle's spleenwort, is a rare hybrid species of ferns within the Asplenium genus, resulting from the cross between Asplenium trichomanes and Asplenium septentrionale. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Asplenium × kummerlei include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Asplenium × kummerlei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although the plant's use should be approached with caution due to its rarity and potential side effects.
